name: PathBudgetPolicy
description: Enforces path allow/deny prefixes and input string length budget for tool calls.

name: AllowDenyPolicy
description: Allows or denies tool calls and instruction types by allow/deny lists.

name: EfsmGatePolicy
description: Gates tool execution based on EFSM state and plan alignment.

name: TaintPolicy
description: Blocks high-risk tools when args contain untrusted snippets from prior tool output.

name: RateLimitPolicy
description: Limits consecutive repeated tool calls per config.

name: OutputBudgetPolicy
description: Truncates assistant content when it exceeds output_budget.max_chars.

name: SecurityLabelPolicy
description: Gates tool calls and RESPOND by security_type (confidence, authority_label, etc.).

name: ExecCompositePolicy
description: Handles multi-segment exec commands using Kernel coarse parse metadata.

name: DeletePolicy
description: Blocks delete-like operations and leaves further continuation to kernel approval flow.

name: RelationalPolicy
description: Applies relational taint / propagated-security checks using kernel-lowered metadata.

name: UnaryGatePolicy
description: Applies declarative unary rules over instruction metadata and reports the matched rule.

name: OpenClawPolicy
description: Ports OpenClaw P1/P3/P7/P9/P10 semantics over current ArbiterOS response/instruction structures.

name: NanobotPolicy
description: Implements Nanobot response-layer guards: exec deny patterns, URL/SSRF checks, and repeated external lookup blocking.

name: AlignmentSentinelPolicy
description: LLM-based pre-exec alignment check for planned tool calls against recent user objective.
